5606.issue: [W5606] i18n "admin/i18n" seems to contain untranslated entries identical to English (>=3 words). 6016.issue: [W6016] [README.md](https://github.com/misanorot/ioBroker.alarm/blob/master/README.md) does not appear to be written in English. [README.md](https://github.com/misanorot/ioBroker.alarm/blob/master/README.md) must be written using English language only. Please translate.
